message:
fix: resolve FAB button truncation on narrow viewports (#8785)

Add shrink-0, min-w/min-h, and aspect-square to the FAB button so
flex containers cannot compress it below its intended circular size.
Without these guards the button could lose its 1:1 aspect ratio and
render as a rounded rectangle instead of a full circle on certain
viewport widths (#8777).

Fixes #8777

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
